column1: # provenance=Economic Report of the President 2024, Table B-1 (PDF p413); committed copy is a single-page qpdf excerpt. MINIMAL subset: col0=Year anchor + col1=GDP percent-change column only, annual rows 1973-1982 (the full ~47-row x ~13-col grid is authored in a separate follow-up). Quarterly sub-rows excluded (their bare I/II/III/IV labels are non-unique anchors).

# companion=render-only (BEA API and FRED returned HTTP 403/auth errors); pdftotext (poppler) used as independent cross-check and confirms all 10 values; rendered page image is the authoritative published source.

# model=rect-bordered (full column verticals; NO interior horizontal row rules; the Year label is an OPEN left column). GoPDF detector drops the Year column and collapses the data rows -> ~0% substantive (the measured capability gap). Negative sign printed as en-dash. Authored from the rendered page image, cross-checked with pdftotext.
